title: Lonn Idd
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Lonn.png]] |name=Lonn Idd |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|White]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children=*[[Vik Idd]] *[[Nikki Idd]] |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I developed that laser to aid me in my droid research, ''not'' as a weapon, Fromm!|Lonn Idd|}} '''Lonn Idd''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who [[Parent/Legends|fathered]] [[Vik Idd|Vik]] and [[Nikki Idd]]. A [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]], he developed a [[Unidentified laser device|laser device]] that was sought after by the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], who tried to get him to install the device—originally intended for research—as a [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] on the [[Tig Fromm's starship|starship]] of their leader, [[Tig Fromm]]. While he initially tried to refuse, he was forced to give in when Nikki arrived, for the gang threatened to harm Lonn's daughter if he continued resisting. After he installed it, however, he and Nikki were saved when Vik and the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], the latter disguised in the protective [[Armor/Legends|armor]] of a [[HK Guardian Droid|Guardian Droid]], distracted Fromm so that Nikki could spray him with [[Nova Starlight]] [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]]. Afterward, the Idds captured the gangmembers, and Lonn repaired C-3PO's [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|droid]] companion, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. ==Biography== ===The laser device=== {{Quote|Please… don't ''harm'' my daughter!|Lonn Idd|}} [[File:LonnIdd-D2.jpg|thumb|right|350px|Lonn Idd (second from right), while captured by the Fromm Gang]] Lonn Idd was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who was the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Vik Idd|Vik]] and [[Nikki Idd]]. A noted [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] early in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]], Lonn was known for [[Droid/Legends|droid]] development among other automata, often using specialized [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] in his research.{{CSWECite|II|76|Idd, Lonn}} Lonn also created a [[Unidentified laser device|laser device]] to help his droid research; however, in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],{{DroidsComicDate}} the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] members [[Tig Fromm]] and [[Vlix Oncard]] invaded [[Lonn Idd's repair station|Lonn's repair station]], interested in his lasers and believing him to be a helpless old man whose only companions were his children. Fromm tied him to a chair and tried to force him via [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogator droid]]{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} to install the device to his [[Tig Fromm's starship|starship]] to be used as a [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]]. Lonn refused, but just as Oncard began to activate a device to try and threaten him with, Nikki arrived, as she was confused as to why her father had not greeted her and Vik upon their arrival as usual. Seeing what Oncard was doing, she burst in to try and stop him. Lonn cried out in alarm at the presence of his daughter, for Fromm now had a way to convince the scientist to cooperate: threatening Nikki. Lonn begged the gangmembers not to harm Nikki, who in the meantime was plotting a way to escape; she stomped on Oncard's [[Limb/Legends|foot]], causing him to move aside and allowing her to activate a monitor so that her brother and the droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] could see what was happening. Fromm again ordered Lonn to install the device, leaving the scientist with no choice. He fully installed the laser, hoping Fromm and company would promptly leave. Instead, Fromm decided to test the laser on the Idds' station, but as he informed them of the planned destruction, a [[HK Guardian Droid|Guardian Droid]] arrived behind him. Lonn was unsure where it had come from, but Vik, noticing the droid's shaking knees, could tell it was on their side. ===Saved by the Guardian Droid=== {{Quote|You'll have a lot of explaining to do to the ''authorities,'' Tig Fromm!|Lonn Idd|}} Fromm, who was interested in the droid's value on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], demanded that the Idds hand over the [[control disk]] for it. Vik came up with a plan and told his sister that she had no choice but to hand it over—despite having no control disk. Not realizing at first, Vik reminded her of what was in her pocket: a disk of [[Nova Starlight]] [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]], which Nikki sprayed in Fromm's face. While he was distracted, the Guardian Droid—protected by strong [[Armor/Legends|armor]]—attacked the gang's [[hover guard]] droids, overtaking them and then cornering the gangmembers so Vik could drop a large [[packing net]] on them. [[File:Lonn_idd.png|thumb|left|270px|Lonn Idd works on R2-D2 in his shop.]] Lonn approached the gang now that they were captured, assuring Fromm that he would have a word with the authorities. Vik then revealed that the "Guardian" was actually C-3PO in disguise. Once out, C-3PO's next priority was R2-D2, who had been damaged on the way to rescuing the Idds. As a droid engineer, Lonn repaired Artoo while Nikki told her side of the story prior to arriving. Once he was finished, he promised the droids that his children could fly them to the nearest [[Intergalactic Droid Agency]] when ready, but Artoo refused—he demanded that someone tell him what had happened, which made all of the Idds laugh. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|It appears I have ''no choice,'' Fromm!|Lonn Idd, when his daughter is threatened|}} Lonn Idd researched in the name of science, not weapons, and was able to resist the methods of the Fromm Gang when they tried to force him to weaponize his device despite the fact that they intimidated him to the point that he was sweating profusely; however, he gave in once his daughter became involved. Idd had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|Don't worry! Our dad can fix any droid in the universe!''"
"''Yeah, he's ''designed'' enough of you guys!|Nikki and Vik Idd|}} A noted scientist, Lonn Idd's children thought highly of his skills: Nikki claimed he could fix any droid in the [[Universe/Legends|universe]]. ==Equipment== Idd wore a green [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]], yellow-orange shoes, and yellow-orange [[spectacles]]. He used a variety of tools while fixing R2-D2. ==Behind the scenes== Lonn Idd was created for the [[Droids (1986) 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[David Manak]], illustrated by [[John Romita Sr.]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[March 18]], [[1986]].{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 38|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[May]] [[1986]]|issn=8750-4367}} While the issue shows Idd's laser device already built, with the Fromm Gang forcing him to install it on their ship, "[[The Droids Re-Animated]]," a [[StarWars.com]] article written by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Abel G. Peña]] and published on [[June 13]], [[2013]], claims that Fromm wanted Idd to build it for him. This article defers to the comic. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Lonn Idd}} *[[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fr=Lonn Idd |nl=Lonn Idd }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Idd, Lonn}} [[Category:Engineers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scientists]]
